name: March 7th
desc: A girl who once slumbered in eternal ice and knows nothing about her past.\nTo find out the truth about her origins, she decided to travel with the Astral Express.\nAs of right now, she has prepared about <unbreak>67</unbreak> different versions of her life story for herself.

1.name: Memory of You
1.desc: Every time March 7th's Ultimate Freezes a target, she regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

2.name: Memory of It
2.desc: Upon entering battle, grants a Shield equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of March 7th's DEF plus <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> to the ally with the lowest HP percentage, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Memory of Everything
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Never Forfeit Again
4.desc: The Talent's <u>Counter</u> effect can be triggered 1 more time in each turn. The DMG dealt by <u>Counter</u> increases by an amount that is equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of March 7th's DEF.

10000003.name: Counter
10000003.desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

5.name: Never Forget Again
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Just Like This, Always...
6.desc: Allies under the protection of the Shield granted by the Skill restore HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> at the beginning of each turn.

100101.name: Frigid Cold Arrow
100101.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's ATK to one enemy.
100101.simple_desc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

100102.name: The Power of Cuteness
100102.desc: Provides a single ally with a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's DEF plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nIf the ally's current HP percentage is <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> or higher, greatly increases the chance of enemies attacking that ally.
100102.simple_desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Applies a Shield</color> on a single ally.

100103.name: Glacial Cascade
100103.desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's ATK to all enemies. Hit enemies have a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to be Frozen for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Frozen, enemies cannot take action and will receive Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
100103.simple_desc: Deals Ice DMG to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>, with <color=#f29e38ff>a chance of Freezing them</color>.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100104.name: Girl Power
100104.desc: After a Shielded ally is attacked by an enemy, March 7th immediately <u>Counters</u>, dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK. This effect can be triggered <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) each turn.
100104.simple_desc: After a Shielded ally is attacked by an enemy, March 7th <color=#f29e38ff>immediately launches a <u>Counter</u></color> against the attacker, dealing minor Ice DMG.

10000003.name: Counter
10000003.desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

100106.name: Attack
100106.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100107.name: Freezing Beauty
100107.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Freeze a random enemy for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Frozen, the enemy cannot take action and will take Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of March 7th's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
100107.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, there is a high chance of inflicting Freeze on a random enemy.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When using Skill, dispels 1 <u>debuff</u> from one designated ally.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

1.point_desc: The duration of the Shield generated from Skill is extended for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
When using Ultimate, increases the <u>base chance</u> to Freeze enemies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.
